text_block_list.name: Optimistic Fan
text_block_list.text: Yesterday's Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe was sooo close!

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text: I don't know about close, but El Condor Pasa certainly put up a fight.

text_block_list.name: Optimistic Fan
text_block_list.text:
Oh come on, did you see Montjeu in the homestretch? It's amazing
she could put up a fight at all!

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I will admit that of all of Japan's racers, El Condor Pasa had the
best chance at winning.

text_block_list.name: Optimistic Fan
text_block_list.text:
That's right, you're always going on about her, saying she's the best
Japan has to offer.

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I guess I already knew this, but... winning overseas isn't that
easy.

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text: Not even the best in Japan can compete on the world stage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Not even... the best in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Best in Japan, here I cooome!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Kyoto Daishoten takes place one week after the Prix de l'Arc de
Triomphe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As such, Special Week is hard at work making her final preparations.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Spe, are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: A-ahaha... I messed up my pace.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Would you like to take a break?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: No, I'm fine. I just need to catch my breath.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps she's still worn out, but something about her smile feels
strained...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
This will be your first 2,400-meter race in Kyoto, so try to imagine the
course, but keep the distance and pace in mind.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
This will be your first 2,400-meter race in Kyoto, so try to imagine the
course, but keep the distance and pace in mind.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Once we've got our groove back with the Kyoto Daishoten, we'll head
into the fall G1 races and get you one step closer to the best in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Once we've got our groove back with the Kyoto Daishoten, we'll head
into the fall G1 races and get you one step closer to the best in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The best in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Even if I become the best in Japan, what good—

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ah, never mind me! I think I've caught my breath, so I'll take another
lap!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (2,400 meters... Keep that distance and your pace in mind...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(I'll win the Kyoto Daishoten, get my groove back, and enter the fall
G1 races in high spirits...)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Then I'll be one step closer to being the best in Japan...)

text_block_list.name: TV Caster
text_block_list.text: Japan's El Condor Pasa was so close... So close! But she was passed at the last minute!

text_block_list.name: TV Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've witnessed the barrier to the world in action! El Condor Pasa's
journey ends in a heart-wrenching second place!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: (Even if I become the best in Japan, does that really mean anything?)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
(Why even race at all... when the rest of the world is so much
stronger?)

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As the fall races fast approach, popular racers gather to battle it out
here at the G2 Kyoto Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The fan favorite today is Special Week. After an amazing spring
season, the crowd has high hopes for her!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The second most popular is Mejiro Bright, and in third is T.M. Opera
O—A lineup packed with G1 winners!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But we can't forget about this racer! In fourth place in the polls is the
racer who rose to fame over the summer, Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: At last... At long last, I'm here! A G2 race! The Kyoto Daishoten!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
I've only ever been able to watch, no matter how much I wanted to
run. At times, running a race like this felt like a fantasy...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But finally, this day has come! I'm racing with G1 racers! I'm racing
with my friends! At long last!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Oh, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, Tsuru.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I heard you're the favorite to win, Spe! That's so amazing!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
But don't get comfy! I'm in perfect racing form! Not to mention all the
hard work I put in preparing for this day!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Huh? Spe, what's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, nothing. You really worked hard, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehehe, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Gotta say, I'm feeling pretty proud of myself. Getting to this point took so, so long...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
Oookay! Tsuyoshi's revved up and ready to race! I'll give all you G1
Umamusumes a run for your money!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text:
And don't you dare go easy on me! I wanna see just what the Derby
Umamusume can do!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: R-right...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Two hundred meters to go! But something's off with Special Week!
Really, really off!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... wheeze... Hnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: From the inside comes Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: T.M. Opera O has caught up as well!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: But in the lead is Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi! Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
This late bloomer has proven to be the Golden Generation's secret
weapon! The winner of the Kyoto Daishoten is Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: In second is Mejiro Bright, followed by T.M. Opera O!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As for the fan favorite Special Week, for the first time ever, she's not
even on the scoreboard!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Spe...
